NOT_FOUND_DESC: The link may be incorrect or has been disabled. Please check with whoever shared it.
NO_SLOTS: No available times on this day. Try another date.
VERIFY_SENT_DESC: We sent a confirmation link to your email. Open it to confirm your booking (valid for 30 minutes).
CONFIRMING_DESC: Please wait while we confirm your booking.
CONFIRM_ERROR_DESC: The confirmation link may have expired or already been used. Please start a new booking.
SUCCESS_DESC: A calendar invite is on its way to your email.
ERROR_GENERIC: We couldn't complete your booking. The time may have just been taken — please pick another slot.
ERROR_EMAIL: Please enter a valid email address.
